raw: {"perspective": "Product Strategist", "findings": [{"file_path": "apps/api/app/routers/aura.py", "what_exists": "AURA score endpoints: get_my_aura, get_aura_explanation, update_sharing_permission, update_visibility", "what_it_does": "Retrieves and computes AURA scores with decay and activity boost; enforces model confidence masking; handles sharing permissions. Does NOT issue badges or manage badge tiers.", "quality_assessment": "High. Clean FastAPI structure, proper rate limiting, security via model name abstraction, effective_score decay logic. Passes code review."}], "summary": "File correctly implements AURA score retrieval and decay mechanics but does not handle badge issuance or tier logic — badge system is missing from backend. Violates Crystal Law 6 Amendment: badge tier updates must not be immediate post-assessment, but no logic exists to delay or decouple tier display.", "next_files_to_read": ["apps/web/src/hooks/use-aura-badge.ts", "apps/api/app/core/assessment/badge_engine.py", "docs/adr/ADR-005-aura-scoring.md"], "whistleblower_flag": "P0: Badge tier logic absent. Users currently see immediate badges post-assessment — direct violation of Crystal Law 6 Amendment. Gamification corrupts mastery."}

findings.what_exists: AURA score endpoints: get_my_aura, get_aura_explanation, update_sharing_permission, update_visibility
findings.what_it_does: Retrieves and computes AURA scores with decay and activity boost; enforces model confidence masking; handles sharing permissions. Does NOT issue badges or manage badge tiers.
findings.quality_assessment: High. Clean FastAPI structure, proper rate limiting, security via model name abstraction, effective_score decay logic. Passes code review.

summary: File correctly implements AURA score retrieval and decay mechanics but does not handle badge issuance or tier logic — badge system is missing from backend. Violates Crystal Law 6 Amendment: badge tier updates must not be immediate post-assessment, but no logic exists to delay or decouple tier display.
whistleblower_flag: P0: Badge tier logic absent. Users currently see immediate badges post-assessment — direct violation of Crystal Law 6 Amendment. Gamification corrupts mastery.
